name: Corrupted Keys
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－シン・キー・ロウ
name_jp_rom: Tsumikagi no Hō - Shin Kī Rō
desc: Target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon 3 "Umbral Horror Mirage Tokens" (Fiend-Type/DARK/Level 1/ATK ?/DEF 0). (When Summoned, each Token's ATK becomes equal to that Xyz Monster's current ATK. They cannot attack your opponent directly or be Tributed, except for a Tribute Summon.) When that face-up Xyz Monster leaves the field, destroy these Tokens.
